title: Verified milestones and current phase status
summary: Verified: B9.5 identity cleanup and B9.7 Operator Mode confirmation layer. Current in progress: B9.8 local scan bridge hardening.
body: Verified status contains proven facts and current phase flags. Proven: B3.2 launch baseline checks pass; B9.5 personal-assistant identity repair passed; B9.5.1/B9.5.2 removed bad companion wording from normal identity/purpose answers; B9.7 Operator Mode slash confirmation layer passed (default OFF, mutation requires Operator Mode, stage first, confirm before execute, high-risk typed confirmation). Current in progress: B9.8 local scan routing/bridge hardening. Local scan behavior is wired for operator actions, but host bridge runtime availability remains environment-dependent and should be reported honestly as unavailable when not running.

facts.statement: Branch is main and synced with origin/main.
Core API, frontend, Open WebUI, and Ollama are reachable.
Auth enforcement passes and chat proof passes.
metadata.model_use_receipt is present and model_use_receipt.model_tag matches effective chat model.
The last verified operator readiness proof used qwen3:14b.
facts.source_detail: Operator readiness report output in this session

facts.statement: B9.5.1/B9.5.2 removed bad companion wording from normal identity answers.
B9.7 Operator Mode slash command confirmation layer passed with default OFF.
facts.source_detail: tests/test_operator_mode_b97.py and frontend operator mode tests

facts.statement: B9.8 local scan routing/bridge is current and in progress.

evidence: User baseline list and command/test outputs in this session.
